children.customGrow:
function(newPositions, activeRegions)
    local limit = 7 -- limit of icons per row
    local rows = 3 -- total rows
    local spacing = 3 -- spacing between icons
    ----------------------
    local check = true
    local xCount = 0
    local yCount = 0
    local tCount = 0
    
    local xOffset = 0
    local yOffset = 0
    local total = #activeRegions
    
    for i, regionData in ipairs(activeRegions) do
        local region = regionData.region
        
        local regionsLeft = total - tCount
        local rowTotal = 1
        
        if total <= limit then
            rowTotal = total
        elseif (regionsLeft < limit and xCount < 1) or not check then
            check = false
            rowTotal = regionsLeft
        elseif yCount >= rows-1 then
            rowTotal = regionsLeft
        elseif total > limit then
            rowTotal = limit
        end
        
        xOffset = 0 - (region.width + spacing) / 2 * (rowTotal-1) + (xCount * (region.width + spacing))
        yOffset = 0 + (region.height + spacing) * yCount -- change '-' to '+' after 0 to grow up instead of down
        
        xCount = xCount + 1
        
        if yCount < rows-1 and check then
            tCount = tCount + 1
            if xCount >= limit then
                xCount = 0
                yCount = yCount + 1
            end
        end
        
        newPositions[i] = {xOffset, yOffset}
    end
end

main.colorFunc:
function(progress,r1,g1,b1,a1)  
    local name = GetSpellInfo(589) -- Change to spell ID of respective ability.  
    local isRange = IsSpellInRange(name,'target')  
    
    if (UnitExists('target') and not UnitIsFriend('target','player') and not UnitIsDead('target')) then  
        if (isRange == 1) then
            return r1,g1,b1,a1
        else
            return 0.8,0.2,0.1,1
        end 
    end  
end

init.custom:
local c1, c2 = CreateColor(0.83,0.72,1,1), CreateColor(1,1,1,1)
---------------------------------------

if not aura_env.region.bar.gradient then
    aura_env.region.bar.gradient = aura_env.region.bar:CreateTexture()
    aura_env.region.bar.mask = aura_env.region.bar:CreateMaskTexture()
end

local bar = aura_env.region.bar
local gradient = bar.gradient
local mask = bar.mask

gradient:SetTexture(bar:GetTexture())
gradient:SetAllPoints(bar.bg)
gradient:SetGradient("HORIZONTAL",c1,c2)

mask:SetTexture([[Interface\AddOns\WeakAuras\Media\Textures\Square_FullWhite]], "CLAMPTOBLACKADDITIVE", "CLAMPTOBLACKADDITIVE", "NEAREST")
mask:SetAllPoints(bar.fg)

bar.fg:SetAlpha(0)
gradient:AddMaskTexture(mask)

children.customText:
function()
    local r = WeakAuras.regions[aura_env.id].region
    r.text2:ClearAllPoints()
    r.text2:SetPoint("TOPRIGHT", r, "TOPRIGHT", 6, 6)
end

trigger.custom:
function(event, arg1, arg2, arg3)
    if (event == "PLAYER_TARGET_CHANGED") then
        aura_env.wc_count = 0
        local name, _, count = WA_GetUnitDebuff("target", 228358, "PLAYER") -- Winter's Chill
        if (name ~= nil) then
            aura_env.wc_count = count
            aura_env.wc_refreshed = false
        end
    end
    if (event == "UNIT_AURA") then
        local hasWC = false
        local name = WA_GetUnitDebuff("target", 228358, "PLAYER") -- Winter's Chill
        if (name ~= nil) then
            hasWC = true
        end
        if (hasWC == false) and (time() - aura_env.flurry_time > 2) then
            aura_env.wc_count = 0
        end
    end
    if (event == "UNIT_SPELLCAST_SUCCEEDED") then
        local id = arg3
        
        if (id == 44614) then -- Flurry
            --local name = WA_GetUnitBuff("player", 190446)-- -- Brain Freeze
            --if (name ~= nil) then--
            aura_env.flurry_time = time()
            aura_env.wc_count = 2
            if (time() - aura_env.comet_storm_time < 2) then 
                aura_env.wc_count = 0
            end
            --end--
        end
        
        if (id == 30455) or (id == 116) or (id == 199786) or (id == 157997) or (id == 431044) then -- Ice Lance / Frostbolt / Glacial Spike / Ice Nova / Frostfire Bolt
            local name, _, count = WA_GetUnitDebuff("target", 228358, "PLAYER") -- Winter's Chill
            count = count or 0
            if(aura_env.wc_count > 0) then
                aura_env.wc_count = aura_env.wc_count - 1
                aura_env.wc_refreshed = false
            end
        end
        
        --[[ if (id == 153595) then -- Comet Storm
            aura_env.wc_count = 0
            aura_env.comet_storm_time = time()
        end ]]--
    end
    
    if (event == "COMBAT_LOG_EVENT_UNFILTERED") then
        local sourceGUID, _, _, _, destGUID = select(4, CombatLogGetCurrentEventInfo())
        local id = select(12, CombatLogGetCurrentEventInfo())
        if(sourceGUID == UnitGUID("player")  and destGUID == UnitGUID("target")) then
            if(id == 443934) then -- Splinterstorm Shatter (predictive)
                aura_env.splinterstorm_time = time()
            end
            if(id == 443747) then -- Splinterstorm (applied per hit)
                aura_env.wc_count = 2
                aura_env.wc_refreshed = true
            end
            if (id == 228598) or (id == 228597) or (id == 228606) then -- Ice Lance / Frostbolt /  Glacial Spike
                if(aura_env.wc_count > 0 and aura_env.wc_refreshed) then
                    aura_env.wc_count = aura_env.wc_count - 1
                    aura_env.wc_refreshed = false
                end
            end
        end
    end
    
    return true
end
trigger.customDuration:
function() 
    local current_count = 0
    if (aura_env.wc_count > 0 or (time() - aura_env.splinterstorm_time < 2)) then
        current_count = 1
    end
    return current_count, 1, true
end

init.custom:
aura_env.wc_count = 0
aura_env.flurry_time = time()
aura_env.comet_storm_time = time()
aura_env.splinterstorm_time = time()
aura_env.wc_refreshed = false

children.customText:
function()
    if aura_env.wc_count == 0 then
        aura_env.region:SetDurationInfo(0, 1, true)
    else
        aura_env.region:SetDurationInfo(1, 1, true)
    end
end

            end
            if (id == 228598) or (id == 228597) or (id == 228606) then -- Ice Lance / Frostbolt /  Glacial Spike
                if(aura_env.wc_count > 0 and aura_env.wc_refreshed) then
                    aura_env.wc_count = aura_env.wc_count - 1
                    aura_env.wc_refreshed = false
                end
            end
        end
    end
    
    return true
end
trigger.customDuration:
function() 
    local current_count = 0
    if (aura_env.wc_count > 1 or (time() - aura_env.splinterstorm_time < 2)) then
        current_count = 1
    end
    return current_count, 1, true
end

children.customGrow:
function(newPositions, activeRegions)
    local limits = { --icons per row
        6, --row 1
        9, --row 2
        
    }
    local rows = #limits -- total rows (matches limits size)
    local iconSizes = { --have to match #limits size (if limits is {x,y} iconSizes have to be {a, b}, i.e. 2 and 2)
        39, --row 1
        33, --row 2
        
    }
    local spacings = {
        1, --row 1
        2, --row 2
        
    }
    
    -- spacing between icons
    local checkFit = true --resize only if total clones > totalWidth. Otherwise 1-2 icons will be giga huge
    ----------------------
    local check = true
    
    local xCount = 0
    local yCount = 0
    local tCount = 0
    local lastRowCount = 0
    
    local limit = limits[yCount+1]
    local firstRowLimit = limits[yCount+1]
    
    local xSpacing = 3
    local ySpacing = spacings[yCount+1]
    local offset = spacings[yCount+1]
    
    local xOffset = 0
    local yOffset = 0
    
    local total = #activeRegions
    
    for i, regionData in ipairs(activeRegions) do
        
        local region = regionData.region
        if iconSizes[yCount+1] then
            regionData.region:SetRegionWidth(iconSizes[yCount+1])
            regionData.region:SetRegionHeight(iconSizes[yCount+1])
        end
        
        local why = 0
        for i=1, yCount+1 do
            local wtf = (i==1 or i==yCount+1) and iconSizes[i]/2 or iconSizes[i]
            why = why + wtf
        end
        local shift = yCount == 0 and 0 or why + offset
        
        local width = width or region.width
        local totalWidth = totalWidth or (width + xSpacing) * limit
        
        local regionsLeft = total - tCount
        local rowTotal = 1
        
        if total <= firstRowLimit then
            rowTotal = total
        elseif (regionsLeft < limit and xCount < 1) or not check then
            check = false
            rowTotal = regionsLeft
        elseif yCount >= rows - 1 then
            rowTotal = regionsLeft
        elseif total > limit then
            rowTotal = limit
        end
        
        if yCount == rows - 1 then
            local fit = checkFit and (width + xSpacing) * rowTotal < totalWidth
            local lastRowWidth = fit and width or ((totalWidth - (rowTotal * xSpacing)) / rowTotal)
            
            xOffset = 0 - (lastRowWidth + xSpacing) / 2 * (rowTotal - 1) + (lastRowCount * (lastRowWidth + xSpacing))
            yOffset = 0 - (shift - (width - lastRowWidth) / 2)-- change '-' to '+' after 0 to grow up instead of down
            
            lastRowCount = lastRowCount + 1
            
            regionData.region:SetRegionWidth(lastRowWidth)
            regionData.region:SetRegionHeight(lastRowWidth)
        else
            xOffset = 0 - (width + xSpacing) / 2 * (rowTotal - 1) + (xCount * (width + xSpacing))
            yOffset = 0 - shift
        end
        
        xCount = xCount + 1
        
        if yCount < rows - 1 and check then
            tCount = tCount + 1
            if xCount >= limit then
                xCount = 0
                yCount = yCount + 1
                limit = limits[yCount+1]
                ySpacing = spacings[yCount+1]
                offset = offset + ySpacing
            end
        end
        
        newPositions[i] = {xOffset, yOffset}
    end
end

main.colorFunc:
function(progress,r1,g1,b1,a1)  
    local name = GetSpellInfo(589) -- Change to spell ID of respective ability.  
    local isRange = IsSpellInRange(name,'target')  
    
    if (UnitExists('target') and not UnitIsFriend('target','player') and not UnitIsDead('target')) then  
        if (isRange == 1) then
            return r1,g1,b1,a1
        else
            return 0.8,0.2,0.1,1
        end 
    end  
end

children.customGrow:
function(newPositions, activeRegions)
    local limit = 6 -- limit of icons per row
    local rows = 4 -- total rows
    local spacing = 3 -- spacing between icons
    ----------------------
    local check = true
    local xCount = 0
    local yCount = 0
    local tCount = 0
    
    local xOffset = 0
    local yOffset = 0
    local total = #activeRegions
    
    for i, regionData in ipairs(activeRegions) do
        local region = regionData.region
        
        local regionsLeft = total - tCount
        local rowTotal = 1
        
        if total <= limit then
            rowTotal = total
        elseif (regionsLeft < limit and xCount < 1) or not check then
            check = false
            rowTotal = regionsLeft
        elseif yCount >= rows-1 then
            rowTotal = regionsLeft
        elseif total > limit then
            rowTotal = limit
        end
        
        xOffset = 0 - (region.width + spacing) / 2 * (rowTotal-1) + (xCount * (region.width + spacing))
        yOffset = 0 - (region.height + spacing) * yCount -- change '-' to '+' after 0 to grow up instead of down
        
        xCount = xCount + 1
        
        if yCount < rows-1 and check then
            tCount = tCount + 1
            if xCount >= limit then
                xCount = 0
                yCount = yCount + 1
            end
        end
        
        newPositions[i] = {xOffset, yOffset}
    end
end
